description: Container runner contract. Defines how containerized builds and tests are executed when container_required=true. Adapter on Worker, not a standalone agent. ADR-021.

node.build_command: npm run build or bun run build

mixed.package_manager: Detect from lockfiles present in container_target

step_2_build.action: Build container image from WORK_PACKET.container_target directory.
requirements: Dockerfile must exist in container_target or be generated from profile.
Build context is limited to container_target directory.
No network access during build except package registry pulls.

step_3_run.action: Run container with mounted repo changes.
isolation: Container runs in read-only filesystem mode.
No network access except explicitly declared services.
Timeout enforced: 300 seconds for node/python, 600 seconds for mixed.

outputs: test_results — Parsed test suite results (suite, passed, failed, skipped).

step_5_emit.validation: Artifact must validate against schema. Exit code 0 required for PASS.

fail_closed_rules.no_dockerfile: FAIL — Cannot build without Dockerfile or profile-generated Dockerfile.
fail_closed_rules.build_failure: FAIL — Non-zero build exit code blocks test execution.
fail_closed_rules.test_failure: Container runs to completion. Test failures captured in test_results. Auditor evaluates.
fail_closed_rules.timeout: FAIL — Container terminated. exit_code set to -1.

when_container_required_true: CONTAINER_RUN artifact must exist and validate against schema.
All test suites must have failed=0.
image_digest must be present and valid.
